title: Bunnie Xo Jokingly Compares Jelly Roll Divorce to Being Released From a 10-Year Prison Sentence
summary: She also revealed that her DMs are attracting a lot of rappers following her split from the country star.
body: Laughter is the best medicine! Amid her divorce from Jelly Roll , Bunnie Xo returned with a new episode of her Dumb Blonde podcast and joked that — similar to a particular convict hitting up her DMs — she’s served her time. Related Jelly Roll Files for Divorce From Bunnie Xo After Nearly 10 Years of Marriage Bunnie Xo Reveals Her DMs Are Full of Thirsty Men Amid Jelly Roll Divorce: ‘Send Help’ Bunnie Xo Tells Her Side of Jelly Roll Divorce & Says They’re Still Having a Baby: ‘We Are Having Our Little Nugget Together’ In a clip from the episode that she posted Thursday (June 25) to her Instagram, Bunnie reads through some of the wildest messages she’s gotten since her split from the country star went public earlier in June. One of them was from a man claiming to be coming up on his release from prison after 10 years behind bars and wanting to get down and dirty with her once he’s out. “After 10 years, he might need it,” joked Bunnie’s friend Meme Shahan. “Same,” Bunnie said with perfect timing, causing everyone in the room to burst out laughing. “I just got out of a 10…

title: Google Wallet will let you know if you can sign up for Touchless ID with TSA PreCheck
summary: TSA PreCheck has been trying to speed travel times up with the addition of Touchless ID, which essentially allows passengers to walk through the enhanced security queue without stopping. Google Wallet is adding an option to opt in for Touchless ID through saved boarding passes.
